title: Arachnophobia
description: Face your fears of spiders and insects in this nightmare of a horror modpack.
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

**Search tags:** horror, scary, spider, spiders, modpack, arachnophobia

---

If you have any complaints, comments, suggestions, or if you need people to play with, please join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

---

This modpack has 5 spider and insect mods, including: arthopod phobia expansions, ConRad's scary spiders, nyf's spiders, spider caves, and spider's world. All of these modpacks include many terrifyingly large spiders and other insects. However, you are not defensless, MrCrayFish's gun mod and just enough guns are installed to make sure you have weapons to fend off the overwhelming amount of spiders. Other mods like vein miner, voice chat, dynamic trees, and corpse are also added to make sure the gaming experience is better. This modpack is very small, this is the first version and more mods will be added in the future.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qJluv647-ck" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

I do NOT own any of the mods in this modpack. I do NOT claim to own any of these mods. I simply combined them into one modpack for you to play.
